title: China calls for maintaining Iran talks momentum

snapshot.title: China calls for maintaining Iran talks momentum
snapshot.description: BEIJING: China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Tuesday called for maintaining the momentum in the negotiations between the ‌US and ‌Iran in ‌a meeting in Beijing with his Saudi counterpart Prince Faisal bin Farhan. "The current ceasefire remains fragile, ‌but ‌talking is better ‌than fighting, ‌and dialogue is better than confrontation," Wang said, according to Xinhua news
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: China calls for maintaining Iran talks momentum | Arab News
